section.title: Claude Code
section.screen:
zb install node
brew install --cask claude-code
echo 'export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL="https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/apps/anthropic"' >> ~/.zshrc echo 'export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="YOUR_DASHSCOPE_API_KEY"' >> ~/.zshrc echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="qwen3.5-plus"' >> ~/.zshrc
zb install anomalyco/tap/opencode
